testcase.name: test_e2e_01_inbox_contact_rag_success

failure.message: ValueError: Nenhum tenant_id ativo no contexto. O middleware de webhook deve ser executado antes de qualquer operação de dados.

testcase.failure:
orchestrator = <app.orchestrator.service.OrchestratorService object at 0x000001CFE45496D0>
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_e2e_01_inbox_contact_rag_success(orchestrator): """ E2E-01: Inbox contato institucional (happy path RAG)
Entrada: - surface = INBOX (IG/FB DM) - user_message = "Qual o telefone da prefeitura?" - external_message_id = "m1"
Saída esperada: - decision = ANSWER_RAG - response_type = SUCCESS - Resposta contém dados vindos do doc
Asserts de auditoria: - classifier_result com {intent, confidence} - policy_pre com {policy_decision: ALLOW} - rag_retrieve com {base_id, query_id, k, docs_count>0} - response_selected com {template: "rag_answer.txt"} - message_sent com {surface: INBOX, channel: IG|FB} """ request = ChatRequest( session_id="test_session_1", message="Qual o telefone da prefeitura?", channel=Channel.INSTAGRAM_DM, surface_type=SurfaceType.INBOX, external_message_id="m1", )
> response, ctx = await orchestrator.process(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests\e2e\test_pipeline_e2e.py:241: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ app\orchestrator\service.py:251: in process rag_result = await self._execute_rag(ctx, expanded_query, policy_pre) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ app\orchestrator\service.py:334: in _execute_rag retrieval = await self.retriever.retrieve(query) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ app\rag\retriever.py:208: in retrieve collection = self._ensure_collection() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ app\rag\retriever.py:163: in _ensure_collection collection_name = self._get_tenant_collection_name() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ app\rag\retriever.py:156: in _get_tenant_collection_name tid = tenant_context.require_tenant() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def require_tenant() -> str: """ Retorna o tenant ativo ou levanta ValueError se não configurado. Use em operações que nunca devem rodar sem tenant isolado. """ tenant_id = _tenant_id_var.get() if not tenant_id: > raise ValueError( "Nenhum tenant_id ativo no contexto. " "O middleware de webhook deve ser executado antes de qualquer operação de dados." ) E ValueError: Nenhum tenant_id ativo no contexto. O middleware de webhook deve ser executado antes de qualquer operação de dados.
app\tenant_context.py:42: ValueError

testcase.name: test_required_audit_fields

failure.message: ValueError: Nenhum tenant_id ativo no contexto. O middleware de webhook deve ser executado antes de qualquer operação de dados.

testcase.failure:
orchestrator = <app.orchestrator.service.OrchestratorService object at 0x000001CFE45FB830>
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_required_audit_fields(orchestrator): """ Verifica campos obrigatórios em qualquer request. """ request = ChatRequest( session_id="test_required", message="Qual o horário?", channel=Channel.WEB_WIDGET, surface_type=SurfaceType.INBOX, external_message_id="req1", )
> response, ctx = await orchestrator.process(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests\e2e\test_pipeline_e2e.py:698: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ app\orchestrator\service.py:251: in process rag_result = await self._execute_rag(ctx, expanded_query, policy_pre) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ app\orchestrator\service.py:334: in _execute_rag retrieval = await self.retriever.retrieve(query) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ app\rag\retriever.py:208: in retrieve collection = self._ensure_collection() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ app\rag\retriever.py:163: in _ensure_collection collection_name = self._get_tenant_collection_name() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ app\rag\retriever.py:156: in _get_tenant_collection_name tid = tenant_context.require_tenant() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def require_tenant() -> str: """ Retorna o tenant ativo ou levanta ValueError se não configurado. Use em operações que nunca devem rodar sem tenant isolado. """ tenant_id = _tenant_id_var.get() if not tenant_id: > raise ValueError( "Nenhum tenant_id ativo no contexto. " "O middleware de webhook deve ser executado antes de qualquer operação de dados." ) E ValueError: Nenhum tenant_id ativo no contexto. O middleware de webhook deve ser executado antes de qualquer operação de dados.
app\tenant_context.py:42: ValueError

testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_analytics_summary(): async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=BASE_URL) as client: response = await client.get("/analytics/summary") > assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_api_chat
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_api_chat(): async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=BASE_URL) as client: payload = {"session_id": "test_session", "message": "Qual o telefone da prefeitura?", "channel": "web", "surface_type": "inbox"} response = await client.post("/api/chat", json=payload) > assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code
tests\test_api.py:30: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_webhook_meta

failure.message: AttributeError: <module 'app.api.webhook' from 'D:\\Projetos\\Desenvolvendo\\chat-bot-pref\\app\\api\\webhook.py'> does not have the attribute 'WebhookHandler'

testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_webhook_meta(): # Mock the WebhookHandler class > with patch("app.api.webhook.WebhookHandler") as MockWebhookHandler: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests\test_api.py:41: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ C:\Users\santo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\unittest\mock.py:1467: in __enter__ original, local = self.get_original() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <unittest.mock._patch object at 0x000001CFE47E2900>
def get_original(self): target = self.getter() name = self.attribute
original = DEFAULT local = False
try: original = target.__dict__[name] except (AttributeError, KeyError): original = getattr(target, name, DEFAULT) else: local = True
if name in _builtins and isinstance(target, ModuleType): self.create = True
if not self.create and original is DEFAULT: > raise AttributeError( "%s does not have the attribute %r" % (target, name) ) E AttributeError: <module 'app.api.webhook' from 'D:\\Projetos\\Desenvolvendo\\chat-bot-pref\\app\\api\\webhook.py'> does not have the attribute 'WebhookHandler'
C:\Users\santo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\unittest\mock.py:1437: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_scraper_ai

failure.message: OSError: pytest: reading from stdin while output is captured! Consider using `-s`.

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_03_valid_arguments_simulation

failure.message: AssertionError: Argparse rejeitou argumentos válidos. Exit code: 1

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_verify_fix.TestVerifyAllFix testMethod=test_03_valid_arguments_simulation>
def test_03_valid_arguments_simulation(self): """ Simula execução com argumentos VÁLIDOS. Verifica se o script passa da fase de argumentos. """ try: import verify_all
# Simula: python verify_all.py pilot-atendimento --url http://localhost:8000 test_args = ['verify_all.py', 'pilot-atendimento', '--url', 'http://localhost:8000']
with patch.object(sys, 'argv', test_args): # Mockamos a função interna de lógica (se soubéssemos o nome) ou requests # Aqui, vamos capturar qualquer Exception que NÃO seja SystemExit. # Se der erro de conexão/arquivo, significa que o argparse funcionou! try: with patch('builtins.print'): # Silencia output > verify_all.main()
tests\test_verify_fix.py:71: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def main(): parser = argparse.ArgumentParser( description="Run complete Antigravity Kit verification suite", formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter, epilog=""" Examples: python scripts/verify_all.py . --url http://localhost:3000 python scripts/verify_all.py . --url https://staging.example.com --no-e2e """ ) parser.add_argument("project", help="Project path to validate") parser.add_argument("--url", required=True, help="URL for performance & E2E checks") parser.add_argument("--no-e2e", action="store_true", help="Skip E2E tests") parser.add_argument("--stop-on-fail", action="store_true", help="Stop on first failure")
args = parser.parse_args()
project_path = Path(args.project).resolve()
if not project_path.exists(): print_error(f"Project path does not exist: {project_path}") > sys.exit(1) E SystemExit: 1
.agent\scripts\verify_all.py:284: SystemExit
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
self = <tests.test_verify_fix.TestVerifyAllFix testMethod=test_03_valid_arguments_simulation>
def test_03_valid_arguments_simulation(self): """ Simula execução com argumentos VÁLIDOS. Verifica se o script passa da fase de argumentos. """ try: import verify_all
# Simula: python verify_all.py pilot-atendimento --url http://localhost:8000 test_args = ['verify_all.py', 'pilot-atendimento', '--url', 'http://localhost:8000']
with patch.object(sys, 'argv', test_args): # Mockamos a função interna de lógica (se soubéssemos o nome) ou requests # Aqui, vamos capturar qualquer Exception que NÃO seja SystemExit. # Se der erro de conexão/arquivo, significa que o argparse funcionou! try: with patch('builtins.print'): # Silencia output verify_all.main() except SystemExit as e: if e.code != 0: > self.fail(f"Argparse rejeitou argumentos válidos. Exit code: {e.code}") E AssertionError: Argparse rejeitou argumentos válidos. Exit code: 1
tests\test_verify_fix.py:74: AssertionError
